Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Champion]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — A Champion does not fail, even one in disgrace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — A Champion can be unnerved by a gaze like solid blue-white eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Champion might be able to keep men off Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — A true Champion of the Champion’s Guild is more than just a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Champions can meditate to hone their skills.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Calder Marten has a Champion on his crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Alchemists claim their solutions can make one like a Champion but unbound by rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Champions possess physical enhancements that are Guild secrets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — A former Champion is on Calder Marten's ship.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — A Champion is a member of the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Champions can be hired to attack people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Calder and Petal planned to bribe their way underneath the arena with the Champion.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — A Champion can be a mercenary for hire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Champion is blindfolded and uses a sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Champion's name is Twelve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Champion augmentation provides resistance to most poisons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Calder has a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Champion samples are available.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Champions have requirements regarding training and the nature of their Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — A Champion is different from Calder.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Champions possess Intent that is preserved better when donated voluntarily than when taken from corpses or involuntarily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — A Champion stood at the end of the row of boxes wearing a blindfold and the Golden Crown of the Champions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Champion is present and began to sweat slightly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Champion is a combatant who was present at the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — A Champion is a powerful individual, often heavily armed, capable of tearing through walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The powers of the two Champions are like two bonfires just out of arm's reach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Meia dreams of rivaling a Champion.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
